headlines.description: Arsenal defeated Rapid Vienna 2-1 in Europa League group stage play, rallying on second-half goals from David Luiz and Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal rally for Europa win on Luiz, Auba goals

headlines.description: AC Milan's Rade Krunic, Brahim Diaz and Jens Petter Hauge netted in a 3-1 win at Celtic in their Europa League Group H opener on Thursday.

headlines.description: Zlatan Ibrahimovic missed another penalty, the third in his last five attempts, as AC Milan cruised past Sparta Prague 3-0 in the Europa League.

headlines.description: After being named in Jose Mourinho's line-up with the likes of Harry Kane and Son Heung-Min rested, Gareth Bale and Dele Alli disappointed.

headlines.description: Arsenal cruised past Dundalk on goals from Edward Nketiah, Joseph Willock and Nicolas Pepe to win their second Europa League group stage match.

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored his 200th career goal for Tottenham Hotspur in his 300th appearance for the club in a Europa League group stage win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores 200th goal for Spurs in UEL win

headlines.shortLinkText: Lille hat trick ends Milan's 24-match unbeaten run

headlines.shortLinkText: Man United beats Roma 6-2, on course for Europa League final
